title: Perl Weekly Challenge - 010
task1_desc: Write a script to encode/decode Roman numerals. For example, given Roman numeral **CCXLVI**, it should return **246**. Similarly, for decimal number **39**, it should return **XXXIX**. Checkout wikipedia [page](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Roman_numerals) for more informaiton.
task1_body: > Write a script to encode/decode Roman numerals. For example, given Roman numeral **CCXLVI**, it should return **246**. Similarly, for decimal number **39**, it should return **XXXIX**. Checkout wikipedia [page](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Roman_numerals) for more informaiton.
task2_desc: Write a script to find **Jaro-Winkler** distance between two strings. For more information check wikipedia [page](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jaro%E2%80%93Winkler_distance).
task2_body: > Write a script to find **Jaro-Winkler** distance between two strings. For more information check wikipedia [page](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jaro%E2%80%93Winkler_distance).
